name: To Late_The last room
short_description: A dark, atmospheric horror game where you explore a mysterious building with just a flashlight. Reality blurs as you go deeper… maybe it’s already too late.
detailed_description: To Late: The Last Room is a short but intense horror experience, where darkness isn’t just a visual challenge – it’s the source of fear itself. Armed only with a weak flashlight, you walk through long, oppressive corridors and uniquely themed rooms, each carefully designed with light and visual effects to enhance the atmosphere. Some doors won’t open easily, and not every room provides answers. The experience is heavily driven by tension and sound design. As you progress, you might begin to realize a darker truth — that you may already be dead, and this is just what comes after. The average playtime is around 30 minutes, but the unsettling feeling may last much longer.
